themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 29 verses. Commentary leans on "Cyprian on Treatise XII Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews: Of the benefits of marty...". Word-study detail reinforces "πιστὸς: faithful - objectively, trustworthy; subjectively, trustful".
